biography:
Li Jun Li (Chinese: 李麗君; pinyin: Lǐ Lìjūn) is an American actress, known for her roles as Iris Chang in the ABC series Quantico, Rose Cooper in the Fox series The Exorcist, Jenny Wah in the Netflix series Wu Assassins, Lady Fay Zhu in the period drama Babylon (2022), and Grace Chow in Sinners (2025).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Li Jun Li, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
name: Li Jun Li
